history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image shows a simple gray rounded-square icon containing a dark circular button with a download arrow and the text “467 kB”.

Main Subject:
A download icon centered inside a dark circular shape, with a downward arrow pointing to a line, followed by the number and unit “467 kB” in white text.

Setting:
This is a graphic user-interface style image on a light gray background with no visible environment beyond the icon.

Visual Details:
The icon is a light gray rounded square with a darker gray outline and subtle shadowing. Inside it, a dark charcoal circular button occupies most of the center area. The download arrow symbol is white, and the text “467 kB” appears in white to the right of the arrow. The lower-right portion shows a partial white curved element that is unclear in purpose.

Visible Text:
467 kB

Practical Summary:
It displays a download-related UI icon with a download arrow and a size indicator of 467 kB. The graphic is minimal and centered, with gray and dark gray tones and white lettering.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.

Gambar tersebut menampilkan sebuah ikon unduh berwarna abu-abu dengan teks "467 kB" di sebelahnya. Teks tersebut menunjukkan ukuran file sebesar 467 kilobyte. Tidak ada konten NSFW, pornografi, atau ketelanjangan dalam gambar ini.

```json
{
  "nsfw": false,
  "confidence": 0,
  "label": "safe"
}
```
